name: Praline Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 25 minutes Baking time: 10 to 12 minutes
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together the butter and packed brown sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in the egg, then stir in the flour, vanilla, and chopped pecans. Mix well by hand.
4. Form the mixture into balls about the size of walnuts.
5. Place the balls on ungreased cookie sheets and flatten to about 1/8 inch thick.
6. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Remove from oven and allow to cool completely before eating.
